text:
There was once a brave young knight named Aryndon. He lived alone in a quiet village. He was well-known far and wide for his gallant deeds. One day, a cruel and powerful duke decided he wanted Aryndon's beautiful princess bride.

However, Aryndon knew he couldn't just snatch her away. He traveled far and wide to seek advice from wise elders. A grizzled old bard told him tales of romance. An ancient owl bestcerted him that courage wasn't enough—he needed wisdom too.

After many nights pondering his journey and countless dreams of fairy tales, Aryndon decided. He would win hearts, not fancy things. He went back home and trained harder than ever. He learned the arts of bravery, persuasion, and cleverness.

Time passed. Enemies fell. Friends grew. Aryndon saved the princess many times. Slowly, her love for him grew too.
